dateTime:
// Use Java's Date/Calendar or preferable Java 8+ java.time API

// --- Using java.util.Date (older style, often mutable) ---
println "--- Using java.util.Date ---"
def nowJavaUtilDate = new Date()
println "Current Date object: ${nowJavaUtilDate}"
// Formatting requires SimpleDateFormat (can be complex/error-prone)
// import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
// def sdf = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
// println "Formatted: ${sdf.format(nowJavaUtilDate)}"

// --- Using java.time (Java 8+, preferred) ---
import java.time.*
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
import java.time.temporal.ChronoField

println "\n--- Using java.time (Java 8+) ---"
def now = LocalDateTime.now() // Local date/time without timezone info
def zonedNow = ZonedDateTime.now() // Local date/time with system default timezone
def utcNow = Instant.now() // Represents a point on the UTC timeline

println "LocalDateTime: ${now}"
println "ZonedDateTime: ${zonedNow}"
println "Instant (UTC): ${utcNow}"

println "\n--- Common Formats (using DateTimeFormatter) ---"
println "ISO Local Date Time: ${now.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)}"
println "ISO Zoned Date Time: ${zonedNow.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_ZONED_DATE_TIME)}"
println "RFC 1123: ${zonedNow.format(DateTimeFormatter.RFC_1123_DATE_TIME)}"

println "\n--- Custom Formats ---"
def customFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
println "Custom ('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'): ${now.format(customFormatter)}"
def readableFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy 'at' hh:mm:ss a zzzz") // EEEE=Day, MMMM=Month, a=AM/PM, zzzz=Timezone Name
println "Readable: ${zonedNow.format(readableFormatter)}"

println "\n--- Components (using java.time accessors) ---"
println "Year: ${now.year}" // or now.getYear()
println "Month: ${now.monthValue}" // or now.getMonth() -> enum JANUARY etc.
println "Day: ${now.dayOfMonth}"
println "Hour: ${now.hour}"
println "Minute: ${now.minute}"
println "Second: ${now.second}"
println "NanoSecond: ${now.nano}"
println "DayOfWeek: ${now.dayOfWeek}" // Enum MONDAY etc.
println "DayOfYear: ${now.dayOfYear}"

println "\n--- Unix Epoch Seconds ---"
long epochSeconds = utcNow.getEpochSecond() // From Instant
// long epochSecondsFromZoned = zonedNow.toEpochSecond()
println "Seconds since epoch (UTC): ${epochSeconds}"
long epochMillis = utcNow.toEpochMilli()
println "Milliseconds since epoch (UTC): ${epochMillis}"
